marketplace.name: end-user-perf
marketplace.description: Evaluate and report end-user performance of web applications using Google Lighthouse. Covers Web Core Vitals, network analysis, and optimization opportunities.
marketplace.longDescription: A Claude Code plugin that runs a Google Lighthouse audit against any web application URL and generates a structured PDF performance report. The agent analyzes raw Lighthouse output and produces a report covering three key areas: Web Core Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS, FCP, TTFB, TBT, Speed Index) with scored pass/fail status; Network Analysis including latency, RTT, throughput, and a MIME-type breakdown table of all resources; and Estimated Savings & Opportunities listing every Lighthouse-identified optimization sorted by time savings, with affected URLs and recommended fixes. A PreToolUse hook automatically validates and installs Lighthouse via npm before any audit runs, with cross-platform support for Linux, macOS, and Windows.

agents.name: perf-report
agents.description: Run a Lighthouse audit on a URL and generate a PDF report covering Web Core Vitals, Network Analysis, and Estimated Savings

hooks.PreToolUse: Validates Lighthouse is installed before any audit; auto-installs via npm with cross-platform support (Linux, macOS, Windows)

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release — Web Core Vitals, Network Analysis, Estimated Savings & Opportunities, PDF report generation, cross-platform Lighthouse auto-install hook
